name: Python Automation Suite
description: A comprehensive automation toolkit that streamlines email processing, WhatsApp messaging, and security operations. Features intelligent scheduling, batch processing, and customizable workflows for maximum productivity.

name: Hand Gesture Control System
description: Computer vision application enabling touchless computer control through hand gestures. Uses MediaPipe for hand tracking and supports custom gesture recognition for various system commands.

name: Voice Command Automation
description: Voice-controlled automation system for hands-free computer operation. Features speech recognition, natural language processing, and integration with system commands for a seamless voice experience.

name: AI-Powered Resume Builder
description: Modern resume builder with AI-powered content suggestions, ATS optimization, and professional template designs. Helps users create standout resumes with intelligent recommendations.

name: Cybersecurity Toolkit
description: Collection of security tools for penetration testing, vulnerability scanning, and system hardening. Includes automated scanning scripts and security report generators.

name: Cloud Infrastructure Manager
description: AWS resource management dashboard for monitoring and managing EC2 instances, S3 buckets, and IAM permissions. Provides cost optimization recommendations and security alerts.
